agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: Higher fundraising expenses represent direct costs that lower winsorized fundraising efficiency levels, showing diminishing returns on solicitation investments.
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Thornton (2006) discusses return determinants on fundraising investments.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A highly statistically significant negative correlation was found. Higher fundraising expense is associated with a slight drop in winsorized fundraising efficiency levels.
